comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Checks flipped to true only after their command ran and evidence was inspected this session. Medium tier per risk-gate-matrix.md omits requirement-traceability from the required set (waived below, cross-referenced instead to specs/ci-mcp/traceability.md and T-011's finalization addendum). placeholder-scan disclosure: mcp/ci-mcp/dist/index.js (this task's committed esbuild bundle) was excluded from the primary scan because it is generated/vendored build output, mirroring check-placeholders.sh's own --exclude-dir=dist convention for directory scans; a literal-file scan against dist/index.js was also run and is disclosed in qg/T-008/check-placeholders-dist-raw.log -- its 3 findings were traced to the third-party ajv dependency (node_modules/ajv/lib/compile/index.ts), not first-party src/, and are an accepted human-reviewed false positive, not this task's own code. unit-tests/acceptance-tests/regression all cite the T-008 acceptance-first red/green pair (AC-014 dist-parity had no committed bundle to diff against and the bundled server could not run pre-implementation; AC-015 Inspector smoke passes post-implementation with byte-identical 3x rebuild verification).

checks.waiver_reason: not tier-required at medium (risk-gate-matrix.md); AC-014/AC-015 chain is recorded in specs/ci-mcp/traceability.md (frozen, task-reviewed) and finalized in reports/implementation/ci-mcp/T-011.md's 19-row Verification Status table
